# Requirements Quality Checklist: Module Styling System

**Purpose**: Validate completeness, clarity, consistency, and coverage of requirements across spec, plan, and data model artifacts
**Created**: 2025-07-17
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md) | [plan.md](../plan.md) | [data-model.md](../data-model.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are accessibility requirements (ARIA roles, keyboard navigation, screen reader support) defined for the style editor drawer, tabs, color picker, and preset cards? [Resolved: basic keyboard support only — Tab/Shift+Tab, Enter, Escape; no broader ARIA/screen-reader expansion in this version.]
- [x] CHK002 Are responsive/mobile layout requirements specified for the slide-in drawer and its contents? [Resolved: desktop-only drawer for this feature; no mobile-specific layout.]
- [x] CHK003 Are loading state requirements defined for when the style editor fetches the 12 style records on open? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-033 and User Story 1 acceptance scenario 9 define skeleton loading and disabled Save until the 12 styles load.]
- [x] CHK004 Are loading state requirements defined for the preset browser while fetching system and user presets? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-034 and User Story 2 acceptance scenario 6 define section loading states and disabled Apply actions while loading.]
- [x] CHK005 Are requirements specified for the visual design and layout of the curated color swatch palette? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-035 defines an evenly spaced 6×4 curated swatch grid grouped by palette type.]
- [x] CHK006 Is the list of curated color swatches documented, or are selection criteria defined? [Resolved: selection criteria are defined as a curated palette of earthy tones, vibrant accents, and neutrals in `spec.md` assumptions and `research.md` R1.]
- [x] CHK007 Are the dimensions, sizing, and positioning of the live preview mock module card specified? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-036 defines a centered fixed preview region with an approximately 320×180 px mock module card.]
- [x] CHK008 Are requirements defined for the drawer's open/close animation or transition behavior? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-038 defines app-standard slide/backdrop transitions, approximate duration, and close affordances.]
- [x] CHK009 Are requirements specified for how user-saved presets are sorted/ordered in the preset browser? [Resolved: newest first.]
- [x] CHK010 Are requirements defined for what happens when a preset rename results in a duplicate name? [Resolved: show inline error `A preset with this name already exists`.]
- [x] CHK011 Are success/confirmation feedback requirements defined for style save, preset apply, preset save, rename, and delete operations? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-039 standardizes success toasts and keeps inline messaging for validation errors.]
- [x] CHK012 Are requirements specified for the visual layout/arrangement of the 12 module type tabs (single row, scrollable, wrapped)? [Resolved: single horizontal scrollable row.]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK013 Is "Default" font family mapped to a specific font or font stack? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-040 maps `Default` to the app sans-serif stack and defines the other font mappings.]
- [x] CHK014 Is the dotted-paper snippet background for the live preview defined with specific visual properties (dot size, spacing, color)? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-037 defines the off-white surface, subtle light-gray dots, and approximate dot size/spacing.]
- [x] CHK015 Is "visual thumbnail cards with color swatches" for preset cards defined with specific layout (which colors shown, arrangement, card dimensions)? [Resolved: `research.md` R5 defines a 4×3 grid of two-tone swatches using `headerBgColor` and `backgroundColor`, with approximate tile and card sizing.]
- [x] CHK016 Is "slide-in side panel" specified with width, position (left/right), overlay behavior, and backdrop requirements? [Resolved: right-side desktop drawer, ~480 px wide; overlay behavior captured in spec/plan.]
- [x] CHK017 Is "immediately" in FR-016 quantified with a specific latency threshold, or linked to an existing success criterion? [Resolved: preset application latency is linked to `SC-003` (all notebook modules update within 3 seconds).]
- [x] CHK018 Can SC-005 ("90% of users can successfully apply a preset on first attempt") be objectively measured without usability testing infrastructure? [Resolved: `spec.md` SC-005 now uses a QA/UAT proxy metric: at least 9 of 10 first-attempt preset applications succeed without facilitator intervention.]
- [x] CHK019 Is "error notification" in FR-021 specified with format, position, duration, and dismissal behavior? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-041 defines destructive toasts in the standard toast stack, ~5 second auto-dismiss, and manual dismissal.]
- [x] CHK020 Is "inline editing" for preset rename specified with trigger mechanism (double-click, edit icon), confirmation (Enter/blur), and cancel (Escape) behavior? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-025 and User Story 4 acceptance scenarios define pencil-icon entry, Enter/blur commit, and Escape cancel.]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK021 Do Title/Subtitle control restrictions in FR-003 align with the data model's control visibility rules (data-model §Module-type-specific control visibility)? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-005/FR-006 and `data-model.md` agree that Title/Subtitle expose only `bodyTextColor` and `fontFamily`, preserving hidden values.]
- [x] CHK022 Are the 9 style property names consistent between spec FR-004, data model NotebookModuleStyle fields, and ModuleStyleFormValues type? [Resolved: the same nine properties appear consistently in `spec.md`, `data-model.md` entity fields, and `ModuleStyleFormValues`.]
- [x] CHK023 Does FR-016's auto-persist behavior align with the state transition diagram's [Dirty] → [Saving] path for preset apply? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-021/FR-022 and `data-model.md` state transitions consistently define confirm-if-dirty, then `Saving`.]
- [x] CHK024 Is the "optimistic update" behavior described consistently across FR-013, FR-016, FR-021, and the plan's Constitution Check §XI? [Resolved: `spec.md`, `research.md` R4, and `plan.md` Constitution XI all describe optimistic update with rollback on error.]
- [x] CHK025 Do the 12 module type names in FR-002 match the ModuleType enum values referenced in the data model? [Resolved: the module names in `spec.md` match `src/lib/types/common.ts` `ModuleType` exactly.]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK026 Does User Story 1 have acceptance scenarios for the case where style save fails (referenced in Edge Cases but not as a formal acceptance scenario)? [Resolved: User Story 1 acceptance scenario 11 now covers save failure with preserved edits and visible retry feedback.]
- [x] CHK027 Are acceptance criteria defined for the color picker interaction flow (open popover, select swatch vs. type hex, close)? [Resolved: User Story 1 acceptance scenarios 13–15 cover swatch selection, valid hex entry, and invalid hex rejection.]
- [x] CHK028 Is the acceptance criterion for FR-012 ("single operation") testable — does it mean one API call, one user click, or one transaction? [Resolved: `research.md` R3 and `contracts/api.md` define this as one bulk `PUT /notebooks/{id}/styles` updating all 12 styles atomically from one save action.]
- [x] CHK029 Does User Story 2 define acceptance criteria for what happens when zero user presets exist alongside system presets? [Resolved: User Story 2 acceptance scenario 7 covers the user empty state while system presets still render normally.]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK030 Are requirements defined for the behavior when the editor is opened while a previous save is still in progress? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-042 and User Story 1 acceptance scenario 10 block concurrent Save/Apply actions and keep the pending state visible.]
- [x] CHK031 Are requirements specified for applying a preset while the style form is in a dirty state (unsaved manual edits)? [Resolved: require confirmation before replacing local edits and auto-persisting preset values.]
- [x] CHK032 Are requirements defined for what values Title/Subtitle hidden properties retain when saving — current server values, defaults, or preset values? [Resolved: preserve existing server-loaded values unchanged.]
- [x] CHK033 Are requirements specified for what happens when a system preset is updated server-side while the user has the preset browser open? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-043 and the Edge Cases section define system presets as static for the duration of an open session.]
- [x] CHK034 Are requirements defined for the "Save as Preset" flow when the user's current styles are identical to an existing preset? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-023, User Story 3 acceptance scenario 5, and `contracts/api.md` allow saving a separate preset when the name is unique.]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK035 Is the behavior specified when borderWidth is set to 0 — should border color/style controls be hidden or disabled? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-044 and User Story 1 acceptance scenario 12 keep the controls visible and enabled while rendering no visible border.]
- [x] CHK036 Is the behavior defined when borderStyle is "None" — should borderWidth, borderRadius, and borderColor controls be hidden or disabled? [Resolved: disable borderWidth, borderRadius, and borderColor controls.]
- [x] CHK037 Are requirements defined for extremely long preset names (up to 50 chars) and their display/truncation in the UI? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-045 and User Story 3 acceptance scenario 4 define single-line truncation with ellipsis and full-name access on hover/focus.]
- [x] CHK038 Is the behavior specified when the user rapidly switches between module type tabs while the preview is rendering? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-046 and the Edge Cases section define last-tab-wins preview behavior.]
- [x] CHK039 Are requirements defined for color picker behavior at screen edges (popover positioning/overflow)? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-047 and the Edge Cases section require popovers to shift or flip to remain visible.]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK040 Are performance requirements for color picker popover open/close latency specified? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-048 defines an approximately 150 ms popover open/close target.]
- [x] CHK041 Are the 5-minute staleTime for system presets and 0 staleTime for notebook styles justified in requirements, or only in the plan? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-049 and `data-model.md` Query Key Mapping define the freshness rationale.]
- [x] CHK042 Is the max 250-line component constraint documented in requirements or only in the plan? [Resolved: `spec.md` Assumptions explicitly marks the 250-line limit as a plan-only implementation constraint, not a product requirement.]
- [x] CHK043 Are internationalization requirements specified for all user-facing strings (error messages, labels, empty states, confirmations)? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-050 requires all styling feature strings to go through the i18n system.]
- [x] CHK044 Are browser compatibility requirements specified for the color picker hex input and popover behavior? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-051 defines support for the latest two desktop versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK045 Is the assumption that "12 module style records are always provisioned by the server" validated with the backend team? [Resolved: `spec.md` FR-016 and Assumptions, plus `contracts/api.md`, now record the confirmed backend guarantee that every style fetch returns exactly 12 provisioned records and no frontend fallback generation is required.]
- [x] CHK046 Is the assumption that "notebook toolbar already exists with a mount point" validated against current implementation? [Resolved: `src/routes/notebook-layout.tsx` mounts `NotebookToolbar`, and `src/features/notebooks/components/NotebookToolbar.tsx` already contains the style-editor trigger location.]
- [x] CHK047 Are the API endpoint contracts (bulk PUT for styles, preset CRUD) documented in the contracts/ directory and aligned with spec requirements? [Resolved: `contracts/api.md` now documents the full styles + preset contract set, including the dedicated preset-apply endpoint and `/users/me/presets` routes.]
- [x] CHK048 Is the StyleEntry.stylesJson serialization/deserialization format fully specified (key naming, optional fields, versioning)? [Resolved: `data-model.md` now defines the exact v1 camelCase keys, required-field rule, excluded fields, and versioning approach.]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK049 The spec states "no unsaved-changes warning needed" (Edge Cases) but does not define whether the form dirty state should be visually indicated — is dirty state indication in scope? [Resolved: yes, show a subtle unsaved-changes indicator.]
- [x] CHK050 FR-001 specifies "paint brush icon or 'Styles' button" — which option is required, or is this a design decision left to implementation? [Resolved: icon-only paint brush trigger with tooltip `Styles`.]
- [x] CHK051 The data model shows UserSavedPreset.styles as `StyleEntry[]` (serialized JSON) while SystemStylePreset.styles is `NotebookModuleStyle[]` — is the asymmetry intentional and are conversion requirements documented? [Resolved: `data-model.md`, `research.md` R4, and `quickstart.md` document the intentional asymmetry and the serialize/deserialize conversion path.]
- [x] CHK052 Is a requirement and acceptance criteria ID scheme consistently applied — FR-### for functional requirements, SC-### for success criteria, but user stories and edge cases lack IDs? [Resolved: `spec.md` Traceability Note states that only `FR-###` and `SC-###` identifiers are normative; stories and edge cases are intentionally descriptive.]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially (CHK001–CHK052) for easy reference
